heading: Limitations on use of financial assistance for certain purposes
label: 9858k Limitations on use of financial assistance for certain purposes
notes: Amendments1992— and made identical technical corrections to directory language of , which added this section.Pub. L. 102–401Pub. L. 102–586Pub. L. 101–508, § 5082(2)
amendments: Amendments1992— and made identical technical corrections to directory language of , which added this section.Pub. L. 102–401Pub. L. 102–586Pub. L. 101–508, § 5082(2)

children.heading: Sectarian purposes and activities
children.label: a Sectarian purposes and activities
children.text: No financial assistance provided under this subchapter, pursuant to the choice of a parent under or through any other grant or contract under the State plan, shall be expended for any sectarian purpose or activity, including sectarian worship or instruction.section 9858c(c)(2)(A)(i)(I) of this title
any services provided to such students during the regular school day;
any services for which such students receive academic credit toward graduation; or
any instructional services which supplant or duplicate the academic program of any public or private school.
